h1: GD&T Profile Tolerance: Basic Knowledge, Types, Symbol, Calculation, Uses

headings.text: GD&T Profile Tolerance: Basic Knowledge, Types, Symbol, Calculation, Uses
Profile Tolerance Calculation: How to Measure Profile Tolerance

meta_description: This concludes the explanation of the basic knowledge, types, symbol, calculation, and uses of GD&T Profile Tolerance.

sections.heading: What is Profile Tolerance?
sections.text: Geometric tolerances are critical for ensuring accuracy and precision in manufactured parts. One important type of geometric tolerance is profile tolerance, which regulates the form of curves, curved surfaces, and other non-flat features. This article provides an in-depth look at profile tolerance, explaining the different types, how to properly indicate profile tolerance on drawings, and examples of using profile tolerance as both a form tolerance and positional tolerance. For those unsure of how to utilize profile tolerances, this guide serves as a helpful reference for properly specifying and interpreting profile tolerance symbols, datum references, and tolerance values on drawings and b...
